data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, or speech bubbles.

data.label: Action
data.content: Austin street scene at night with multiple kava bar storefronts. Neon signs, string lights between buildings, people walking between venues. South Congress or East Austin vibe — food trucks, murals on walls, live music energy. Warm night, outdoor seating, eclectic mix of people. Keep Austin Weird spirit without the text.
